creator: yokota@res.otaru-uc.ac.jp
text:
I don't know exactly why, but when I used USE_GCC=4.x, I didn't need 
this specification (lower layers of directories are searched first with 
gcc4?).

Koji

Mikhail Teterin wrote:
> On 횖'횗횚횓횋횄횗 21 횉횘횛횆횇횓횠 2007, Koji Yokota wrote:
> = +.if ${OSVERSION} < 700007
> = +# order of -I matters for gcc3;
> = +# includes of qt4 must be found earlier than those of qt3
>
> Is not this true on all systems -- 6.x, 7.x, 8.x, 5.x?
>
> 	-mi
>
